comment: "What I found most interesting was the integration of acute management, surgical decision-making, and long-term rehabilitation. It really highlighted how multidisciplinary burn care has to be."
"I liked the lectures, the videos presented by the director, and the content."
"I enjoyed learning about the hydration of burn victims and the value of topical use of antibiotics."
"I found the flexibility of learning at my own pace and the variety of interactive online resources valuable."
"The information is well summarized and to the point."
"The most important aspect of this course is that it provides the basic concepts of burns management in the early stges and the treatment of all the stages of burns at the primary level."
